title: LG Soft India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: LG Soft India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
LG Soft India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Noida operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LG Soft India:
LG Soft India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Soft India!
